news.t: Carbon Collective Investing Launches the Carbon Collective Climate Solutions U.S. Equity ETF (Nasdaq: CCSO)

holdings.infoBox: CCSO is an equity ETF with a total of 124 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nucor stock at 5.59%, Southern Copper at 5.16%, Republic Services at 5.13%, Johnson Controls International at 5.06%, and Carrier Global at 5.02%.

overview.description: The Carbon Collective Climate Solutions U.S. Equity ETF (CCSO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US-listed companies who are focused on building solutions to properly address climate change. CCSO was launched on Sep 19, 2022 and is issued by Tidal.

data.title: Carbon Collective Investing Launches the Carbon Collective Climate Solutions U.S. Equity ETF (Nasdaq: CCSO)
data.text: BERKELEY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Carbon Collective Investing, LLC (“Carbon Collective”), a climate change-focused online investment advisor, today announced the launch of the Carbon Collective Clima...
